name: GJJ
title: About | Guerrilla Jiu-Jitsu Modesto
description: Discover more about Guerrilla Jiu-Jitsu Modesto, Modesto's leading Jiu-Jitsu and self-defense school. Meet our experienced instructors and try a free class.
h2s: Copyright Guerrilla Jiu-Jitsu Modesto 2026. All rights reserved | Privacy Policy | Terms & Conditions
paragraphs: Nine years of professional Jiu-Jitsu experience

"This is an excellent place to train whether you are an adult, teenager, or child. Professor Eric and Coach Matt provide exceptional instruction and a safe environment where everyone can grow mentally and physically strong. I've been training here for a year and half and would highly recommend Infinum BJJ!"
"Great place to train! Professor Eric is extremely devoted to his students and has a wealth of knowledge in Brazilian Jiujitsu. Definitely best place to train Martial Arts in Brantford."

This dojo is amazing! My children have been going here for over a year now and love it! The coaches are fantastic, serious when need to be but also fun and welcoming. They teach not only for competitive fighting but also for self defense. All the classes available, from the kids to the adult classes, to the judo and woman's classes are structured, informative and engaging.
